caption:
Ou kone komien dimounn rode to bizness lor Google?

Si to pa ena enn bon website — zot trouve to concurrents ladan.

Google prefer bizness ki ena:
✓ Enn website ki charze vit
✓ Konteni ki kler ek konplet
✓ Enn Google Business Profile aktif

Bienzoli setup tou sa pou twa — website + Google Business Profile + analytics — depi Rs 18,000.

To bizness merite enn chans lor Google. Contact nou zordi.

---

Do you know how many people search for your business on Google?

If you don't have a website, they're finding your competitors instead.

templateData.kreolText: Ou kone komien dimounn rode to bizness lor Google?
templateData.englishTranslation: If you don't have a website, they're finding your competitors instead.
